channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 5.6%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Angela Rayner says Starmer should ‘reflect on’ stepping aside after HMRC clears her over tax affairs - UK politics live
item.description: Angela Rayner says Starmer should ‘reflect on’ stepping aside after HMRC clears her over tax affairs - UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer latest: PM insists he will still fight on as Streeting holds off on launching leadership challenge
item.description: Starmer latest: PM insists he will still fight on as Streeting holds off on launching leadership challenge

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Today’s newsletter: on the individual decisions that could doom Keir Starmer or secure him in place:
item.description: Today’s newsletter: on the individual decisions that could doom Keir Starmer or secure him in place:

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Streeting in standoff with No 10 as allies claim ‘things are shifting’
item.description: Streeting in standoff with No 10 as allies claim ‘things are shifting’

item.title: i Politics: The surprise names who could run in a Labour leadership race
item.description: The surprise names who could run in a Labour leadership race

item.title: LabourList: Streeting would lose leadership contest against Keir Starmer, poll reveals
item.description: Streeting would lose leadership contest against Keir Starmer, poll reveals

item.title: Independent UK Politics: The Latest: Prime Minister Keir Starmer's future remains uncertain
item.description: The Latest: Prime Minister Keir Starmer's future remains uncertain

item.title: Independent UK Politics: More Mandelson files ‘set to be released next week’ in yet another blow to Starmer
item.description: More Mandelson files ‘set to be released next week’ in yet another blow to Starmer

item.title: FT UK Politics: NHS hospitals hit key target on waiting times in boost for Streeting
item.description: NHS hospitals hit key target on waiting times in boost for Streeting

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Leadership rules should ‘not be tweaked’ to let Burnham run for PM, Labour NEC member says
item.description: Leadership rules should ‘not be tweaked’ to let Burnham run for PM, Labour NEC member says
